text:
Trying to rip cd- 

cdda2wav -vall cddb=0 -paranoia -Owav -B (freedb timeout)

Apparently freedb has been shut down. There is replacement hosted by dbpoweramp, and -cddbp-server=servername option however, I cannot get it to work.

https://hydrogenaud.io/index.php?topic=119006.msg981467#msg981467
